stages.task: fetch ProductHunt launch data (title, description, upvotes, maker profile, hunt details)
identify: 1) partnership angle (does our stack integrate?), 2) content angle (review-worthy?), 3) audience (who benefits?), 4) revenue potential (affiliate, feature, integration?)

send personalized partnership email to founder (integration, review feature, affiliate opportunity)
